Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory352.jpg'}

{3: 'The power of routine carries an immense inertia. Something as mundane as a cup of less-than-perfect coffee is enough to overshadow the memories of adventures, reducing them to mere delusions of a confused mind.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Boss, can we maybe buy some higher-quality coffee beans? Splurging on non-discounted beans once in a while won\'t bankrupt us.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Here\'s your newspaper, here\'s your toast, and here\'s your subpar coffee. Ah, my beloved rainy day... looks like we won\'t be getting any customers today.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'The room is cold, so you always keep your hands in your pockets, but this is the first time you\'ve been pricked by a needle. You pull out a button with fine threads attached to it.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Oh, it\'s a little gift from Tiny Doll!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I\'ve told you a hundred times, Eileena...', 3: '17', 4: 'It\'s Luna.', 5: '18'}
{2: 'Don\'t go around giving people nicknames.', 3: '19'}
{2: 'Mind your manners, Eileena.', 3: '19'}
{3: 'Eileena shrugs dismissively, casually pulls out a detective novel, and retreats to the sofa, curling up like a cat.'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Flip the sign at the entrance to "Open", and remember to bring the umbrella back. Since you\'ve received a tip, you should hurry to the meeting.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I have a feeling that our adventures and the dangers won\'t end here.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Have you given me a nickname?', 3: '27'}
{2: 'I\'m serious, Eileena.', 3: '28'}
{3: 'She pretends not to hear you, waiting until your footsteps are gone from the doorway before speaking.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Crisis Walker.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Always surrounded by danger, yet always managing to survive... Such is the blessing bestowed upon us both.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'What about me then? What do you call me, Eileena? That is your name now, isn\'t it?', 4: '2'}
{2: '???', 3: 'I think it\'s better to call you "Sister," since we were made by the same great creator.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'At the coffee-table-slash-workbench, the mysterious man pours himself a cup of coffee, tracing his finger along the rim with no intention of drinking it.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'No, just call me Eileena. Let\'s not make this any more awkward than it already is.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I seem to have some impression of you. My intuition tells me I shouldn\'t have too much contact with a dangerous entity like you.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'I just came to check on you.', 4: '2'}
{2: '???', 3: 'And to remind you not to interfere with their experiments. I don\'t want to repeatedly discard the same sample, Eileena. There\'s no point in that.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'If that\'s what you\'re thinking, why not just eliminate me completely, like you did with Cradle?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The atmosphere grows heavy. Eileena turns a page in her book and boldly continues with her deduction.'}

{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'The reason you haven\'t eliminated me isn\'t because you don\'t want to, but because you can\'t. I\'m guessing we\'re on the same level, and they haven\'t granted you that kind of authority.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'It seems your time with humans has made you a bit smarter.', 4: '2'}
{2: '???', 3: 'But not smart enough to escape their influence completely.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I thank you for your "kind reminder," but I still reserve the right to make my own choices.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Perhaps we\'ll meet again soon, but for now, I\'m politely asking you to leave.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Good luck to you, Eileena. Let us say goodbye like humans do.', 4: '2'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Luck is also part of the experiment. When facing a being that cannot be gazed upon directly, I just hope you\'re lucky enough. That\'s all...', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The man\'s apparition vanishes. The coffee cup is somehow empty now, leaving behind only a cryptic coffee ring on the table. Eileena lets out a cold snort.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3401_19.jpg'}

{3: 'After the Holy Maiden incident, the church, as a landmark, began reconstruction immediately upon its ruins. Scars are relegated to history, and people are faulted for the calamities. Only glory is claimed for the divine.'}

{2: 'Mother Superior', 3: 'Ah, you\'re the new clergy member. Where are your transfer papers? Never mind, we\'ll handle the paperwork later. Head to the confession booth quickly. There\'s already a line forming there.'}
{2: 'Mother Superior, I...', 3: '71'}
{2: 'Mother Superior', 3: 'Stop dawdling! You\'ve dedicated your life to the divine. Would you keep these suffering souls waiting?'}
{2: 'A-alright, then.', 3: '73'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1378.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1378.jpg'}
{3: 'The confession booth is a lightless, gloomy little room with a perforated partition and two uncomfortable chairs, as if reminding the visitors that this is no cafe.'}
{2: 'May the divine be with you.', 3: '79'}
{2: 'Understood. I will try my best to change my ways, ma\'am.', 3: '82'}
{2: '???', 3: 'You may address me as Countess. At least they haven\'t stripped me of that title yet.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'As you wish, Countess.', 3: '84'}
{2: 'Please begin your confession, Your Grace.', 3: '85'}
{2: 'What sins do you wish to confess to the being above the gray mist?', 3: '86'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'This isn\'t so much a confession as it is a declaration.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Soon, I will go into the Mist to carry out some necessary killings. For the city\'s future, of course.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Killing has never been encouraged...', 3: '92'}
{2: 'Though it could be considered a righteous act under special circumstances.', 3: '95'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You\'re quite a decent member of the clergy. At least you\'re very flexible in your understanding of the doctrine.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You don\'t seem very familiar with confession, Your Grace. Perhaps...', 3: '98'}
{2: 'Let me ask the questions instead.', 3: '99'}
{2: 'In the name of the divine, I implore you to be truthful...', 3: '100'}
{2: 'Otherwise, our conversation will be meaningless.', 3: '101'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Very well, I promise you my complete honesty.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Who do you intend to kill?', 3: '104'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'The entity that dwells above the gray mist... I intend to declare war against it.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The one who erased Cradle, who manipulates the people of this city, who spread the Mist, who abandoned us all.'}
{2: 'Have you considered the possibility of failure?', 3: '108'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I know my chances of winning are slim, but I\'m sick of being caged in the Mist. I want to step out of this little "box" and see what\'s out there.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Before the docks fell to ruin, ships from this city sailed distant seas. The sailors spoke of creatures called whales. I often wonder what such beings are like.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Maybe the world outside is better. Maybe it\'s worse. But to grasp that future\'s "possibility," I... we must make our last stand.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Looks like you\'ve thought this through.', 3: '112'}
{2: 'Now, let\'s talk about Luna.', 3: '113'}
{3: 'Alpha warily places Daybreak on the wooden board in front of the partition.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Why bring her up all of a sudden?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'She didn\'t come with you today?', 3: '118'}
{3: 'As you take out a button, Alpha instantly understands Luna\'s little scheme. The other end of the thread has been sewn into your coat.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'She has her plans, and I have mine. We\'re free from each other. After I kill—', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Mind your words, Countess.', 3: '121'}
{2: 'Do not speak so lightly of taking lives.', 3: '122'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Once everything is settled, Luna and I will go our separate ways.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Just like you and Little Alarm Clock, we look after each other while maintaining our freedom.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Little Alarm Clock?', 3: '127', 4: 'Eileena?', 5: '127', 6: 'What a terrible nickname.', 7: '127'}
{3: 'Speaking of which, it reminds you of another dangerous matter... something that could almost be called a sin.'}
{2: 'Did you try to seize Eileena\'s existence for yourself?', 3: '129'}
{2: 'Or... did you consider killing her?', 3: '130'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Yes. She was almost the perfect vessel for Luna.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Luna and I did "plan" for it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Why did you abandon the plan?', 3: '133'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I don\'t want to tell you.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I want your explanation.', 3: '136'}
{2: 'I can\'t pretend this doesn\'t matter to me.', 3: '137'}
{2: 'I\'ve tried, Countess.', 3: '138'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: '...No reason. I just didn\'t want to harm her.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Because she was under your protection? Because she saved my life? No, neither would be reason enough.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Do no evil, lest hellfire consume you. Some paths, once taken, allow no return.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I shouldn\'t do it. That\'s the only reason. Even as an Aberration, I can still choose to be human rather than a monster.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Unusually, Alpha carefully chooses her words. Each sentence seems to have been rehearsed countless times in her mind before being spoken.'}
{2: 'I must commend your courage.', 3: '146'}
{2: 'To face the abyss and still...', 3: '147'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Stop. I have no obligation to listen to your nonsense.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'My patience is wearing thin. When will this confession be over?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'One last thing.', 3: '152'}
{2: 'Back then... I "killed" you.', 3: '153'}
{2: 'Was awakening Luna also part of your plan?', 3: '154'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'It has always been.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You always intended to sacrifice yourself...', 3: '157'}
{2: 'In exchange for Luna\'s life.', 3: '158'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'This has been my only wish for as long as I can remember.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Like a dying camel in the desert, her soul wanders endlessly, thirsting for just one sip from the spring.'}
{2: 'Why did you choose me to do it?', 3: '162'}
{2: 'What made you so certain I would go through with it?', 3: '163'}
{2: 'That wasn\'t easy, Alpha...', 3: '164'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You\'ve already asked your "one last thing."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You\'re that kind of person, 【kuroname】.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'A bleeding-heart do-gooder?', 3: '171', 4: 'Your kin?', 5: '173', 6: 'Your friend?', 7: '175'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'No. Someone who will do what\'s right.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'No. Someone who is worthy of my trust.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Yes... Alright, this is where it ends.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'May the divine be with you.', 3: '178'}
{2: 'So the hatred\'s gone, then? You no longer hate the Alpha you are. No longer hate the Aberration you are.', 3: '179'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'It seems if I don\'t answer, you won\'t let me leave this confessional today.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Yes. I\'ve stopped hating. I\'ve come to accept my strength, the fate of being an Aberration, and the name I gave myself—Alpha.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Alpha rises. She draws back the curtain and quietly meets your eyes. Her hands are outstretched, thread-thin strings running between them, connecting one hand to the other.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You already know the answer. But I can\'t say it out loud. At the very least, don\'t force me to.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I... have nothing more to ask.', 3: '189'}
{2: 'All the best to you, Alpha.', 3: '190'}

{3: '"All the best to you, Alpha." You couldn\'t think of a better blessing than that. Before this moment, "Alpha" meant nothing but a pale, hollow existence. But from now on, Alpha has a future, one she gets to define.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Time to depart. Into the Mist.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'A destined battle awaits in its depths.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory532.jpg'}
{1: '1007', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront119.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'AniZhuanchangEnd'}
{1: '1', 2: '<size=40>In a hidden passage on the other side of the city,</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '200', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '2', 2: '<size=40>a little doll gazes inside a coffin at herself.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '150', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{2: 'In a hidden passage on the other side of the city, a little doll gazes inside a coffin at herself.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiFubenRogueLike/FxUiFubenRogueLike01.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>She snaps her fingers, and flames ignite.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '50', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '6', 2: '<size=40>and the guilt in her sister\'s heart.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '-150', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{2: 'She snaps her fingers, and flames ignite. It\'s time to bury everything: this body, and the guilt in her sister\'s heart.'}
{1: '1', 2: '<size=40>The doll runs toward her sister.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '100', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '2', 2: '<size=40>Luna will return to the depths of her sister\'s mind</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '50', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>until she is called forth again,</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '0', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{2: 'The doll runs toward her sister. Luna will return to the depths of her sister\'s mind until she is called forth again, when they will truly reunite.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiFubenRogueLike/FxUiFubenRogueLike01.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory352.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory352.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: '<size=40>Eileena closes the door and flips</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '150', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '2', 2: '<size=40>the wooden sign at the entrance to show it\'s closed.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '100', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena closes the door, and flips the wooden sign at the entrance to show it\'s closed.'}
{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>She caresses the sign reluctantly,</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '0', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{2: 'She caresses the sign reluctantly, hoping to return soon.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory896.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory896.jpg'}
{1: '2', 2: '<size=40>Roland issues a blank check to the warden as</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '100', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>payment for transferring Gray Raven to the Countess\' cell.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '50', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '4', 2: '<size=40>As it turns out, he has placed his trust in the right person.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '-50', 9: '3', 11: '1'}

{2: 'In a nobleman\'s reception hall, Roland issues a blank check to the warden as payment for transferring Gray Raven to the Countess\' cell. As it turns out, he has placed his trust in the right person.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>strings buried in the foundation of the world,</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '50', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '4', 2: '<size=40>with puppets being manipulated everywhere.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '0', 9: '3', 11: '1'}
{1: '6', 2: '<size=40>are the hands of an even greater existence.</size>', 3: '-500', 4: '-150', 9: '3', 11: '1'}

{2: 'Zooming out from the streets to the city reveals strings buried in the foundation of the world, with puppets being manipulated everywhere. At the other end of these strings... are the hands of an even greater existence.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1.2'}
{2: 'To be continued.'}
